title: Fadnavis presents ₹7.69 lakh crore Maharashtra Budget, loan waiver for farmers
content:
Fadnavis presented the Maharashtra Budget.
*   The budget is valued at ₹7.69 lakh crore.
*   A key feature of the budget is a loan waiver for farmers.

title: Youth, student groups criticise Karnataka Budget over jobs, education funding
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Youth and student organizations have criticized the Karnataka Budget.
*   Their main objection centers on the funding allocated for jobs.
*   Concerns were also raised regarding the budget's provisions for education.

title: Budget has schemes and projects lined up for North Karnataka
content:
The latest budget includes specific allocations.
*   These funds are earmarked for various schemes and projects.
*   The initiatives are specifically designed for North Karnataka.

title: CM Revanth Reddy launches ‘Praja Palana–Pragati Pranalika’ with key projects in Hyderabad
content:
Chief Minister Revanth Reddy has launched a new initiative.
*   The initiative, named ‘Praja Palana–Pragati Pranalika’, involves key projects.
*   These projects are focused on Hyderabad.

title: HC notices to govt. over corruption in housing scheme
content:
The High Court (HC) has issued official notices.
*   These notices are directed at the government, citing allegations of corruption.
*   The alleged corruption specifically pertains to a housing scheme.

title: Census 2027: Self-enumeration process between July 17 and 31 this year in Tamil Nadu
content:
The self-enumeration process for Census 2027 is scheduled.
*   It will take place between July 17 and 31 this year.
*   This initiative is specifically for Tamil Nadu.

title: 56 Naan Mudhalvan scheme trainees clear civil services exam
content:
56 trainees from the Naan Mudhalvan scheme have successfully cleared the civil services examination.
*   The achievement highlights the scheme's effectiveness in preparing candidates for competitive exams.
*   This marks a significant success for the Naan Mudhalvan initiative.

title: Former Minister Vellamandi N. Natarajan appointed AIADMK organisation secretary
content:
Former Minister Vellamandi N. Natarajan has received a new appointment.
*   He has been named the AIADMK organisation secretary.
*   This signifies a key role within the political party.

title: Budget has increased debt burden, say BJP and JD (S)
content:
The recent budget is reported to have increased the national debt burden.
*   This assessment is made by two prominent political parties: the BJP and JD(S).
*   Their statement signifies criticism of the budget's financial implications.

title: Budget reflects State’s continued focus on diverse growth: trade bodies
content:
The State's new budget highlights an ongoing commitment to fostering economic growth across various sectors.
*   This indicates a strategic focus on diversification rather than reliance on a single industry or area.
*   Various trade bodies have affirmed and commented on this governmental strategy reflected in the budget.
